projectDescription: A community-maintained collection of standardized brand colors for blockchain protocols, chains, and tokens used in Dune Analytics visualizations.
keyFeatures: Standardized brand colors for 350+ blockchain protocols and chains
Automatic color application in Dune Analytics visualizations
Flexible alias system for protocol name variations
JSON schema validation and duplicate alias detection
Community-driven contributions with automated CI checks
publicApiSurface: Protocol color entries with hex codes and aliases
Alias matching system (case-insensitive with evm_<color:*> support)
